title: Supply Chain Manager - IndiGo Cargo - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Supply Chain Manager - IndiGo Cargo - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
Join the IndiGo Cargo family as a Supply Chain Manager in Madurai. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About IndiGo Cargo:
IndiGo Cargo is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Cold Chain Logistics
• Proficiency in Data Analytics

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Professional development and training programs
• Learning & development budget
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IndiGo Cargo!
